page.title: Campaigns
page.signInHint: Sign in to see your campaigns and launch new ones.
page.emptyMine: You have not created any campaigns yet.

public.title: Public campaigns
public.ownCampaignHint: You are the creator of this campaign.
public.subtitle: Browse campaigns currently active on the platform.
public.empty: No active approved campaigns at the moment.

resourceJoin.title: Join your resources to this campaign
resourceJoin.subtitle: Select one or more active resources and send join requests to the campaign creator.
resourceJoin.loadingFailed: Unable to load your resources right now.
resourceJoin.empty: You have no active resources available to join.
resourceJoin.signInRequired: Sign in to request joining your resources to this campaign.
resourceJoin.joinFailed: Unable to send join request. Please try again.

needJoin.title: Join your needs to this campaign
needJoin.subtitle: Select one or more active needs and send join requests to the campaign creator.
needJoin.loadingFailed: Unable to load your needs right now.
needJoin.empty: You have no active needs available to join.
needJoin.signInRequired: Sign in to request joining your needs to this campaign.
needJoin.joinFailed: Unable to send join request. Please try again.

pending.title: Pending campaigns
pending.subtitle: Review pending campaigns and approve those that should be publicly listed.
pending.onlyManagers: Only administrator accounts can approve campaigns.
pending.empty: No campaigns are waiting for approval.

create.title: Create a campaign
create.subtitle: Campaigns are created in pending moderation state.

fields.title: Campaign title
fields.themeHelper: Theme is rich content for people on the campaign page. It explains the campaign in detail for human readers.
fields.descriptionHelper: Description is plain text used in metadata for bots and previews. It should summarize the same campaign theme for external crawlers.

moderationNotes.title: Add Moderation Note
moderationNotes.notePlaceholder: Explain what should be updated before approval
moderationNotes.updateSuccess: Campaign updated successfully. A notification has been sent to the moderator, and you can still update the campaign again if needed.

triage.title: Campaign need triage
triage.subtitle: Review needs joined to campaigns you created and accept or reject pending requests.
triage.empty: No joined needs available for triage.
triage.emptyForCampaign: No needs to triage for this campaign.

resourceTriage.title: Campaign resource triage
resourceTriage.subtitle: Review resources joined to campaigns you created and accept or reject pending requests.
resourceTriage.empty: No joined resources available for triage.
resourceTriage.emptyForCampaign: No resources to triage for this campaign.
